explanation: This command uses equivalent syntax for filtering (-Filter *), selects specific properties (Select-Object), and exports to a file (Out-File), which is a variation of the original command.
This command uses the short form of the filter flag (-f instead of -Filter), uses Out-String to convert output, and writes to a file using Set-Content instead of Out-File, which is a safe mutation.
This command uses an alternative output method (Export-Csv) and includes the -NoTypeInformation flag, which is optional but commonly used, making it a safe variation.
